summary: Completed the synthetic M2 prototype world fixture with 30 districts, 10 settlements, regional seasonal curves, route and geometry validation, and deterministic runtime pack output.

tests_run.result: Reported modified content/schema/runtime/tools/tests/task files plus pre-existing dirty project routing/state files; no merge or push performed.

M2 fixture validation passed: districts=30 settlements=10 regionalSeasonalCurves=4 routes=42 mapGeometries=40 manifestHash=9ab72b0b.

tests_run.command: pnpm --filter @monsoon/content-schema typecheck && pnpm --filter @monsoon/content-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @monsoon/content-tools typecheck
tests_run.result: All three affected package typechecks passed.
Repeated M2 compiles produced manifestHash=9ab72b0b and routeKinds coast, river, road.

decisions: Kept M2 world data synthetic under M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001: FICTIONAL historicity, validation-only fixture provenance, placeholder display keys, and no real geography or historical claims.
Extended existing content schema/runtime/tools only for M2 district, settlement, regional seasonal curve, route, and map geometry DTOs plus compile-time semantic checks.
Runtime indexing remains ID-based; no display-name lookup was introduced.
M2 fixture uses integer coordinates and basis-point seasonal values for later monsoon, agriculture, river, and road behavior tests.
risks: Risk level remains R3 because this extends content protocol/runtime pack shapes and compiler validation.
Workspace still contains pre-existing dirty project routing/state files and route messages outside this task's output handoff; they were not reverted or further edited in this recovery pass.
requested_action: Review M2 content schema/runtime/compiler boundaries, fixture policy compliance, deterministic ordering, and compile-time reference validation.
